Location.title: Location
Location.description: A place within the UCSC campus.

building.description: The building where the location is situated.

category.description: The type of location (e.g., Lab, Office, Lecture Hall).

description.description: A brief description of the location.

directions.description: Step-by-step directions to find the location.

updatedAt.description: When the location was last updated.

User.title: User
User.description: A user of the system, potentially an admin.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles and roles.
